title: Animal Communication
editorialSummary: Animals grouped by their primary mode of non-vocal communication; the false trail is that both honeybees and fireflies use signal patterns to communicate, but the honeybee uses movement (waggle dance) while the firefly uses bioluminescent light flashes — solvers who group all signal-pattern animals together will mix the visual-light and movement categories. False trail: Platypus and Sharks use electroreception for hunting, not communication — genuine electric-signal communicators are weakly electric fish.

groups.label: Animals That Communicate by Chemical Signal
